title: JUnit Cheat Sheet
description: Essential JUnit commands and patterns for testing in Java.

commands.description: Mark a method as a test method.
commands.scenario: Mark a method as a test method.

commands.description: Execute once before all test methods in the class.
commands.scenario: Execute once before all test methods in the class.

commands.description: Execute once after all test methods in the class.
commands.scenario: Execute once after all test methods in the class.

commands.description: Check that two values are equal.
commands.scenario: Check that two values are equal.

commands.description: Check that a condition is true.
commands.scenario: Check that a condition is true.

commands.description: Check that an object is not null.
commands.scenario: Check that an object is not null.

commands.description: Provide a source of arguments for a parameterized test.
commands.scenario: Provide a source of arguments for a parameterized test.

commands.description: Use method source for parameterized test arguments.
commands.scenario: Use method source for parameterized test arguments.

commands.description: Expect an exception to be thrown by the test method.
commands.scenario: Expect an exception to be thrown by the test method.

commands.description: Assert that a specific exception is thrown.
commands.scenario: Assert that a specific exception is thrown.

commands.description: Verify that no exceptions are thrown by the test method.
commands.scenario: Verify that no exceptions are thrown by the test method.

commands.description: Create a test suite to run multiple test classes.
commands.scenario: Create a test suite to run multiple test classes.

commands.description: Include test classes in a test suite.
commands.scenario: Include test classes in a test suite.

commands.description: Specify package for test discovery in a suite.
commands.scenario: Specify package for test discovery in a suite.
